message:
fix: add output size limit to NodeDebug to prevent browser freezes (#3797) (#3808)

Large command outputs (dmesg, iptables -L, etc.) could freeze the browser
when stored in React state and rendered. This adds a truncateOutput helper
that caps output at 500 lines / 50 KB (keeping the tail), and displays a
yellow "output truncated" indicator when the limit is hit.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
